title: arctotis suffruticosa
intro: Arctotis suffruticosa, also known as the Bush Daisy or Cape Marigold, is a perennial shrub native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Arctotis suffruticosa include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Arctotis suffruticosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as a topical treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
